text:
GG0170C5 Mobility: Lying to Sitting at Side of Bed Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Lying to sitting on side of bed: The ability to move from lying on the back to sitting on the side of the bed with feet flat on the floor, and with no back support. effective 10/01/2019
762 GG0170D5_STND_INTRIM_CD GG0170D5_STND_INTRIM_CD GG0170D5 Mobility: Sitting to Standing Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Sit to stand: The ability to come to a standing position from sitting in a chair, wheelchair, or on the side of
